name: Acme Design System
description: A confident enterprise Design System for clear product and sales communication.

colors.name: Acme Blue
colors.description: Use for primary actions, key headings, and moments that need strong Acme recognition.

colors.name: Deep Acme Blue
colors.description: Use for high-contrast backgrounds and serious executive sections.

colors.name: Signal Amber
colors.description: Use sparingly to highlight important metrics, calls to action, or alerts.

colors.name: Ink
colors.description: Use for primary body text and dense information that must remain highly legible.

colors.name: Cloud
colors.description: Use for subtle panels, page backgrounds, and low-emphasis separation.

colors.name: Growth Green
colors.description: Use for positive performance, confirmed states, and growth-oriented signals.

logo.name: Primary Logo
logo.description: Use as the standard logo on light slide backgrounds.
